episodes.title: Pilot
episodes.summaryEn: A high-school chemistry teacher (Bryan Cranston) is diagnosed with a deadly cancer, so he puts his expertise to use and teams with an ex-student (Aaron Paul) to manufacture top-grade crystal meth in hopes of providing for his family after he's gone.
episodes.summaryZh: 一名高中化学老师（布莱恩·科兰斯顿饰）被诊断出患有致命癌症，因此他利用自己的专业知识与一名前学生（亚伦·保罗饰）合作制造顶级冰毒，希望在他去世后养活家人。

episodes.title: Cat's in the Bag...
episodes.summaryEn: After the accident in the desert, Walter and Jesse need to dispose of the unfortunate mess in their rolling lab of an RV, and Skyler begins to suspect that Walter and Jesse are involved in some mysterious goings-on.
episodes.summaryZh: 沙漠事故发生后，沃尔特和杰西需要处理他们的房车滚动实验室中不幸的混乱，斯凯勒开始怀疑沃尔特和杰西卷入了一些神秘的事件。

episodes.title: ...and the Bag's in the River
episodes.summaryEn: Walter and Jesse fight about the latter's drug use, so he leaves, forcing Walter to deal with their captive, Krazy-8 (Max Arciniega); Hank uses scared-straight tactics with Walter Jr. when his aunt suspects he's smoking pot; Skyler is furious when Walter stays away from home.
episodes.summaryZh: 沃尔特和杰西因后者吸毒问题发生争执，杰西离开，迫使沃尔特去对付他们的俘虏 Krazy-8（马克斯·阿尔尼尼加饰）；当汉克的姨妈怀疑他吸食大麻时，汉克对小沃尔特采取了惊吓策略；当沃尔特不在家时，斯凯勒非常愤怒。

episodes.title: Cancer Man
episodes.summaryEn: Walter announces to the family that he has cancer; the DEA believes there is a new big-time player in the Albuquerque drug business; a depressed Walter takes his anger out on a worthy recipient; Jesse pays a surprise visit to his parents' house.
episodes.summaryZh: 沃尔特向家人宣布他患有癌症； DEA 认为阿尔伯克基毒品行业出现了新的巨头；沮丧的沃尔特将愤怒发泄在一个值得接受的人身上；杰西突然拜访了他父母的家。

episodes.title: Gray Matter
episodes.summaryEn: At a birthday party for a successful former science colleague, Walter is offered a job; Jesse tries gaining legitimate employment but winds up back cooking meth, and an inferior kind at that; Skyler assembles the family for an intervention to get Walter to agree to chemotherapy, but he's concerned about quality-of-life issues and their financial difficulties.
episodes.summaryZh: 在一位成功的前科学同事的生日聚会上，沃尔特获得了一份工作；杰西试图获得合法的工作，但最终却又开始制作冰毒，而且是一种低劣的冰毒。斯凯勒召集家人进行干预，以使沃尔特同意化疗，但他担心生活质量问题和他们的经济困难。

episodes.title: Crazy Handful of Nothin'
episodes.summaryEn: Walter, in the throes of his chemotherapy treatment and needing money more than ever, agrees to cook more crystal meth with Jesse; Skinny Pete hooks Jesse up with an important new contact, while the DEA intensifies its investigation of Albuquerque's new drug kingpin.
episodes.summaryZh: 沃尔特正处于化疗的痛苦之中，比以往任何时候都更需要钱，他同意和杰西一起煮更多的冰毒。瘦皮皮特为杰西勾搭上了一位重要的新联系人，而美国缉毒局则加紧了对阿尔伯克基新毒枭的调查。

episodes.title: A No-Rough-Stuff-Type Deal
episodes.summaryEn: Walter and Jesse do business with a new partner-in-crime, but immediately run into "production problems," which necessitates a nearly impossible mission to knock off a chemical-supply house. Meanwhile, Marie throws a baby shower for Skyler and presents her with an unusual gift that shows a different side of the aunt-to-be.
episodes.summaryZh: 沃尔特和杰西与一个新的犯罪伙伴做生意，但立即遇到了“生产问题”，这需要完成一项几乎不可能完成的任务：摧毁一座化学品供应室。与此同时，玛丽为斯凯勒举办了迎婴派对，并送给她一份不寻常的礼物，展示了这位准阿姨的另一面。

episodes.title: Seven Thirty-Seven
episodes.summaryEn: Season 2 kicks off with Walt and Jesse once again bearing witness to Tuco's incendiary disposition, which leads them to the conclusion that it's time to put an end to their business dealings with him. But the question is how. Meanwhile, Hank serves as a go-between for estranged sisters Skyler and Marie.
episodes.summaryZh: 第二季开始时，沃尔特和杰西再次目睹了图科的煽动性性格，这使他们得出结论，是时候结束与他的业务往来了。但问题是如何。与此同时，汉克充当关系疏远的姐妹斯凯勒和玛丽的中间人。

episodes.title: Grilled
episodes.summaryEn: Trying to dissociate themselves from the volatile Tuco takes a bad turn when Walt and Jesse get trapped with the dealer, and Skyler, worried about her missing husband, receives comfort from her sister and brother-in-law. Hank, meanwhile, pays a business call on Jesse's mother.
episodes.summaryZh: 当沃尔特和杰西被毒贩困住时，试图与反复无常的图科划清界限的想法发生了糟糕的转变，而斯凯勒担心她失踪的丈夫，从她的姐姐和姐夫那里得到安慰。与此同时，汉克拜访了杰西的母亲。

episodes.title: Bit by a Dead Bee
episodes.summaryEn: Walt and Jesse attempt to cover their tracks and distance themselves from Tuco, but they soon find that business is taking a hit along with their financial situation. Meanwhile, Hank and his DEA investigation into the meth ring get a major break that just might put Walt and Jesse in their crosshairs.
episodes.summaryZh: 沃尔特和杰西试图掩盖自己的行踪并与图科保持距离，但他们很快发现业务和财务状况都受到了打击。与此同时，汉克和他的缉毒局对冰毒环的调查取得了重大突破，这可能会让沃尔特和杰西成为他们的瞄准目标。

episodes.title: Down
episodes.summaryEn: Despite Walt's attempt to reconnect with the family, a suspicious Skyler keeps him at arm's length and worries about what he's been up to while he's been away from the house; Jesse finds himself on the streets once again and struggles to improve his lot in life.
episodes.summaryZh: 尽管沃尔特试图与家人重新取得联系，但多疑的斯凯勒仍与他保持一定的距离，并担心他离开家期间的所作所为。杰西发现自己再次流落街头，并努力改善自己的生活。

episodes.title: Breakage
episodes.summaryEn: Hank deals with some lingering aftereffects from his confrontation with Tuco; bills are piling up at the White house and tensions are beginning to run high; Jesse organizes a crew of dealers to take their product to the streets.
episodes.summaryZh: 汉克应对与图科对抗带来的一些挥之不去的后遗症；白宫的账单堆积如山，紧张局势开始加剧；杰西组织了一群经销商将他们的产品带到街上。

episodes.title: Peekaboo
episodes.summaryEn: Walt returns to teaching at the high school; when Skinny Pete gets taken advantage of and ripped off, Jesse steps in, but bites off more than he can chew; Skyler takes the opportunity to show her appreciation for Gretchen's kindness in picking up the tab for Walt's treatments.
episodes.summaryZh: 沃尔特重返高中任教；当瘦皮特被利用并被敲诈时，杰西介入，但贪得无厌；斯凯勒借此机会向格雷琴支付沃尔特治疗费用的善意表示感谢。

episodes.title: Negro Y Azul
episodes.summaryEn: Walt and Jesse contemplate an expansion of their business; Hank experiences a hassle in El Paso as he tries to adapt to his new coworkers; Skyler's new job opportunity leads to her reconnecting with an ex-colleague; and Jesse interacts with his new landlady.
episodes.summaryZh: 沃尔特和杰西考虑扩大他们的业务；汉克在埃尔帕索试图适应新同事时遇到了麻烦。斯凯勒的新工作机会让她与一位前同事重新建立了联系；杰西与他的新女房东互动。

episodes.title: Better Call Saul
episodes.summaryEn: Badger's brush with the law leads Walt and Jesse to call in a shady lawyer; the DEA believes it has a line on the mysterious and elusive "Heisenberg"; Hank's stint in El Paso is up and he returns to Albuquerque, but his mental makeup causes concern for Marie.
episodes.summaryZh: 巴杰触犯了法律，沃尔特和杰西请来了一位可疑的律师； DEA 相信它与神秘且难以捉摸的“海森堡”有联系；汉克在埃尔帕索的任期结束，他返回阿尔伯克基，但他的精神构造引起了玛丽的担忧。

episodes.title: 4 Days Out
episodes.summaryEn: After undergoing a PET-CAT scan and fearing the worst, Walt takes lawyer Saul's advice and hunkers down for a marathon session of cooking product; Jesse's romance with his landlady is heating up, but must cool off quickly when he and Walt head for the desert to take care of business.
episodes.summaryZh: 在接受了 PET-CAT 扫描后，沃尔特担心会出现最坏的情况，他接受了律师索尔的建议，开始了一场马拉松式的烹饪活动。杰西与女房东的恋情正在升温，但当他和沃尔特前往沙漠处理生意时，他的恋情必须迅速降温。

episodes.title: Over
episodes.summaryEn: The Whites throw a party to thank family and friends for their support through Walt's trying time, but it turns ugly when he and Hank get into a bitter argument; later, a pent-up and fed-up Walt tries to occupy his time with home-improvement projects. Worried about Walt's physical and emotional states, Skyler confides in her boss; Jane keeps her relationship with Jesse a secret from her father.
episodes.summaryZh: 怀特一家举办了一场派对，感谢家人和朋友在沃尔特艰难时期的支持，但当他和汉克陷入激烈争吵时，事情变得丑陋；后来，郁郁寡欢的沃尔特试图用家庭装修项目来打发时间。斯凯勒担心沃尔特的身体和情绪状态，向老板吐露心声。简对父亲隐瞒了她与杰西的关系。

episodes.title: Mandala
episodes.summaryEn: Saul suggests a new business partner for Walt and Jesse after they begin to lose their dealers to some unforeseen circumstances. At work, Skyler confronts Ted after she uncovers some unnerving information; and Jesse opens up to Jane about what he does for a living, with disastrous results.
episodes.summaryZh: 沃尔特和杰西因一些不可预见的情况开始失去经销商后，索尔为他们建议了一个新的商业伙伴。在工作中，斯凯勒发现了一些令人不安的信息后与泰德对峙。杰西向简坦白了他的谋生方式，但结果却是灾难性的。

episodes.title: Phoenix
episodes.summaryEn: A new addition joins the White family as Walter Jr. attempts to help out his struggling family by launching a new Web site. Elsewhere, Jesse's addiction worsens and his relationship with Jane begins to negatively impact Walt and her father.
episodes.summaryZh: 小沃尔特 (Walter Jr.) 试图通过推出新网站来帮助陷入困境的家庭，怀特家族迎来了新成员。在其他地方，杰西的毒瘾恶化，他与简的关系开始对沃尔特和她的父亲产生负面影响。

episodes.title: ABQ
episodes.summaryEn: In the Season 2 finale, Skyler's frustration with Walt's secrecy boils over; Jesse is dealt a devastating blow that leads him down a path of self-destruction, and only Walt is willing to help him; and a grief-stricken Donald experiences more tragedy.
episodes.summaryZh: 在第二季结局中，斯凯勒对沃尔特的保密感到沮丧。杰西受到毁灭性的打击，走上了自我毁灭的道路，只有沃尔特愿意帮助他；悲痛欲绝的唐纳德经历了更多的悲剧。

episodes.title: No Más
episodes.summaryEn: In the third-season premiere, Walt faces a new threat on a new front and deals with an increasingly angry Skyler, who must consider what to do next with her life and the kids'. Meanwhile, Jesse comes face-to-face with some startling self-revelations.
episodes.summaryZh: 在第三季首播中，沃尔特在新的战线上面临新的威胁，并与日益愤怒的斯凯勒打交道，斯凯勒必须考虑下一步该如何处理自己和孩子们的生活。与此同时，杰西面对一些令人震惊的自我揭露。

episodes.title: Caballo sin Nombre
episodes.summaryEn: Despite ever-increasing tension between Walt and Skyler, he pulls out all the stops in an effort to reconcile with the family. Elsewhere, Saul is instrumental in getting Jesse involved in a most-unusual investment opportunity.
episodes.summaryZh: 尽管沃尔特和斯凯勒之间的关系日益紧张，但他还是竭尽全力试图与家人和解。在其他地方，索尔在让杰西参与一个最不寻常的投资机会方面发挥了重要作用。

episodes.title: I.F.T.
episodes.summaryEn: Walt disregards Skyler's demands and the rift between them widens dramatically, pushing her to take even more drastic steps. Meanwhile, continuing anxiety and panic attacks plague Hank, which leads to a serious situation at the Drug Enforcement Agency.
episodes.summaryZh: 沃尔特无视斯凯勒的要求，他们之间的裂痕急剧扩大，迫使她采取更激烈的措施。与此同时，持续的焦虑和恐慌困扰着汉克，这导致缉毒局的局势变得严峻。

episodes.title: Green Light
episodes.summaryEn: Skyler's latest bit of bad news proves to be a blow to Walt, and his loss of control endangers his job and his business relationships with Saul and Jesse. Hank goes full-speed ahead into the agency's investigation of the blue-meth case, while Jesse cooks up a new plan.
episodes.summaryZh: 斯凯勒最新的坏消息对沃尔特来说是一个打击，他的失控危及了他的工作以及他与索尔和杰西的业务关系。汉克全速推进该机构对蓝色冰毒案件的调查，而杰西制定了一个新计划。

episodes.title: Más
episodes.summaryEn: When Gus intensifies efforts to persuade Walt to get back in the meth business, Jesse takes exception and a rift appears in his and Walt's personal relationship. Meanwhile, Skyler's new relationship isn't turning out as she'd like; and Marie tells Skyler about her concerns for the increasingly troubled Hank and his well-being.
episodes.summaryZh: 当格斯加紧努力说服沃尔特重返冰毒行业时，杰西表示反对，他和沃尔特的个人关系出现了裂痕。与此同时，斯凯勒的新恋情并没有如她所愿。玛丽向斯凯勒讲述了她对日益陷入困境的汉克及其福祉的担忧。

episodes.title: Sunset
episodes.summaryEn: Walt moves into new digs and a distraught Walter Jr. demands to know just where his parents' relationship stands. Meanwhile, Hank's investigation is beginning to hit too close to home for Walt, causing serious concerns for him and Jesse.
episodes.summaryZh: 沃尔特搬进了新住所，心烦意乱的小沃尔特要求知道他父母的关系到底如何。与此同时，汉克的调查开始触及沃尔特的要害，引起他和杰西的严重担忧。

episodes.title: One Minute
episodes.summaryEn: Hank's behavior becomes increasingly more unpredictable and volatile, which leads to a confrontation with Jesse and problems at the DEA; Skyler wants Walt to make a deal; and Gus' decisions result in some serious consequences.
episodes.summaryZh: 汉克的行为变得越来越难以预测和反复无常，这导致了与杰西的对抗以及缉毒局的问题；斯凯勒希望沃尔特达成协议；格斯的决定导致了一些严重的后果。

episodes.title: I See You
episodes.summaryEn: The White and Schrader families anxiously await word on Hank's condition. Meanwhile, Jesse takes care of business at the lab while Walt tries to make peace with Gus, but after witnessing a terrifying flash of anger, Walt starts to fear for his and his family's lives.
episodes.summaryZh: 怀特和施拉德的家人焦急地等待汉克病情的消息。与此同时，杰西负责实验室的事务，而沃尔特则试图与格斯和解，但在目睹了可怕的愤怒瞬间后，沃尔特开始担心自己和家人的生命。

episodes.title: Kafkaesque
episodes.summaryEn: Hank's stay in the hospital is accompanied by some daunting bills, but Skyler thinks she has a way of dealing with them. Meanwhile, some of the problems between Walt and Gus are ameliorated; and Jesse seeks more independence and grabs a profitable opportunity that presents itself.
episodes.summaryZh: 汉克住院期间伴随着一些令人畏惧的账单，但斯凯勒认为她有办法处理这些账单。与此同时，沃尔特和格斯之间的一些问题得到了改善。杰西寻求更多的独立性并抓住出现的有利可图的机会。

episodes.title: Fly
episodes.summaryEn: When Walt becomes driven to distraction by a contaminant in the lab, he refuses to cook meth until they are able to get rid of it.
episodes.summaryZh: 当沃尔特因实验室中的污染物而心烦意乱时，他拒绝煮冰毒，直到他们能够清除它。

episodes.title: Abiquiu
episodes.summaryEn: Skyler's increased involvement in Walt's business causes him concern; Hank's recovery is plagued by setbacks; and Jesse makes a surprising discovery as he gets more involved in his new enterprise.
episodes.summaryZh: 斯凯勒越来越多地参与沃尔特的生意，引起了他的担忧；汉克的康复过程中遇到了挫折；当杰西更多地参与他的新事业时，他有了一个惊人的发现。

episodes.title: Half Measures
episodes.summaryEn: Jesse ignores Walt's advice and finds himself in a dangerous situation. Fearing for Jesse's safety, Walt takes drastic measures to try to put things right. And tragedy strikes following an unexpected confrontation.
episodes.summaryZh: 杰西无视沃尔特的建议，发现自己陷入了危险的境地。由于担心杰西的安全，沃尔特采取严厉措施试图扭转局面。一场意想不到的对抗之后，悲剧发生了。

episodes.title: Full Measure
episodes.summaryEn: Jesse goes on the lam in the third-season finale. But Mike is right on his heels, so Walt works a deal with Gus and comes up with an unsettling plan that might help guarantee both his and Jesse's safety.
episodes.summaryZh: 杰西在第三季结局中逃亡。但迈克紧随其后，沃尔特与格斯达成协议，并提出了一个令人不安的计划，这可能有助于保证他和杰西的安全。

episodes.title: Box Cutter
episodes.summaryEn: In the Season 4 opener, Walt and Jesse are confronted by the life-threatening consequences of their actions. Meanwhile, Skyler contends with a puzzling disappearance, and Marie finds it difficult to help a recovering Hank.
episodes.summaryZh: 在第四季的揭幕战中，沃尔特和杰西面临着他们的行为所带来的危及生命的后果。与此同时，斯凯勒面临着一场令人费解的失踪事件，玛丽发现很难帮助正在康复的汉克。

episodes.title: Thirty-Eight Snub
episodes.summaryEn: Walt tries to establish a new alliance as he plots his next move. Meanwhile, Skyler urges Walt to consider a business opportunity that could keep the family safe.
episodes.summaryZh: 沃尔特在策划下一步行动时试图建立一个新的联盟。与此同时，斯凯勒敦促沃尔特考虑一个可以保证家人安全的商业机会。

episodes.title: Open House
episodes.summaryEn: Goings-on at Jesse's place start to get out of control; Skyler reluctantly turns to Saul for help; Marie settles back into an old habit; and Hank hears from an old friend who needs assistance.
episodes.summaryZh: 杰西家里的事情开始失控；斯凯勒不情愿地向索尔寻求帮助；玛丽又恢复了旧习惯。汉克听到一位老朋友需要帮助。

episodes.title: Bullet Points
episodes.summaryEn: The Cartel makes a power move; Skyler and Walt reveal something embarrassing to the family; and Jesse's misdeeds bring some unwanted attention.
episodes.summaryZh: 卡特尔采取权力行动；斯凯勒和沃尔特向家人透露了一些尴尬的事情；杰西的不当行为引起了一些不必要的关注。

episodes.title: Shotgun
episodes.summaryEn: Jesse's disappearance leaves Walt fearing the worst; Skyler has a surprising reunion; and Hank gives Det. Roberts bad news.
episodes.summaryZh: 杰西的失踪让沃尔特担心最坏的情况发生。斯凯勒意外重逢；汉克给了侦探。罗伯茨的坏消息。

episodes.title: Cornered
episodes.summaryEn: A shocking discovery unsettles Skyler; Walter Jr. leans on his father to make a special purchase; Mike gets surprise help from Jesse.
episodes.summaryZh: 一个令人震惊的发现让斯凯勒感到不安；小沃尔特 (Walter Jr.) 依靠父亲购买了一件特别的商品。迈克意外地得到了杰西的帮助。

episodes.title: Problem Dog
episodes.summaryEn: A frustrated Walt takes on a risky gamble; Skyler encounters problems with her latest business venture; Hank requires Walter Jr.'s services for an unusual reason.
episodes.summaryZh: 沮丧的沃尔特进行了一场冒险的赌博；斯凯勒在她最新的商业冒险中遇到了问题；汉克出于一个不寻常的原因需要小沃尔特的服务。

episodes.title: Hermanos
episodes.summaryEn: Skyler devises a plan to cure her money woes; Hank recruits Walt to help him work out a theory, while Walt grows impatient with Jesse.
episodes.summaryZh: 斯凯勒制定了一个计划来解决她的金钱困境；汉克招募沃尔特来帮助他提出理论，而沃尔特对杰西越来越不耐烦。

episodes.title: Bug
episodes.summaryEn: Mistakes from Skyler's past prove to be impactful to the present; Gus is spurred to action against rivals; Jesse seeks help from Walt but the results are mixed.
episodes.summaryZh: 事实证明，斯凯勒过去犯下的错误对现在有影响。格斯被激励采取行动对抗竞争对手；杰西向沃尔特寻求帮助，但结果好坏参半。

episodes.title: Salud
episodes.summaryEn: The family becomes gravely concerned when Walt doesn't show up for his son's 16th birthday celebration. And Jesse's lab skills are tested in Walt's absence.
episodes.summaryZh: 当沃尔特没有出席儿子的 16 岁生日庆祝活动时，家人感到非常担心。杰西的实验室技能在沃尔特不在的情况下受到考验。

episodes.title: Crawl Space
episodes.summaryEn: Walt moves to protect his secret and Gus; Skyler is stymied in her attempt to help Ted with his financial problem.
episodes.summaryZh: 沃尔特采取行动保护他的秘密和格斯；斯凯勒试图帮助泰德解决财务问题，但受阻。

episodes.title: End Times
episodes.summaryEn: Hank leans on Gomez to explore one final lead, as Walt scrambles to protect his family. Meanwhile, Jesse learns some unsettling news and races to share it with Walt.
episodes.summaryZh: 汉克依靠戈麦斯寻找最后一条线索，而沃尔特则竭力保护家人。与此同时，杰西得知了一些令人不安的消息，并急忙与沃尔特分享。

episodes.title: Face Off
episodes.summaryEn: The fourth season ends with Walt and Jesse squaring off against Gus. Elsewhere, Walt acquires a surprise confederate with help from Saul.
episodes.summaryZh: 第四季以沃尔特和杰西与格斯对决而结束。在其他地方，沃尔特在索尔的帮助下意外地结识了盟友。

episodes.title: Live Free or Die
episodes.summaryEn: In the series 5 premiere, Walt deals with the aftermath of the explosion, while Hank wraps up his investigation of Gus and his criminal empire.
episodes.summaryZh: 在第五季首播中，沃尔特处理爆炸的后果，而汉克则结束了对格斯及其犯罪帝国的调查。

episodes.title: Madrigal
episodes.summaryEn: Walt and Jesse seek out an unlikely partner for a new business venture. The DEA follows up new leads in its investigation.
episodes.summaryZh: 沃尔特和杰西为一家新企业寻找一个不太可能的合作伙伴。美国缉毒局在调查中追踪新线索。

episodes.title: Hazard Pay
episodes.summaryEn: Walt and Jesse put a business plan into action. Walt confesses a secret to Marie.
episodes.summaryZh: 沃尔特和杰西将商业计划付诸实施。沃尔特向玛丽坦白了一个秘密。

episodes.title: Fifty-One
episodes.summaryEn: Walt celebrates another birthday. Skyler considers her options. An associate complicates Walt and Jesse's plan.
episodes.summaryZh: 沃尔特又庆祝了一个生日。斯凯勒考虑她的选择。一名同事使沃尔特和杰西的计划变得复杂。

episodes.title: Dead Freight
episodes.summaryEn: Walt's team must get creative to obtain the materials they need to continue their operation.
episodes.summaryZh: 沃尔特的团队必须发挥创造力来获取继续运作所需的材料。

episodes.title: Buyout
episodes.summaryEn: Walt, Jesse, and Mike struggle over the future of their business, as occupational hazards weigh on Jesse.
episodes.summaryZh: 沃尔特、杰西和迈克为自己企业的未来而苦苦挣扎，因为职业危害给杰西带来了压力。

episodes.title: Say My Name
episodes.summaryEn: Walt takes control of business matters as Mike grapples with the consequences of his actions.
episodes.summaryZh: 沃尔特掌控了业务事务，而迈克则努力应对自己行为的后果。

episodes.title: Gliding Over All
episodes.summaryEn: Walt ties up loose ends. Seeing the evidence of his success, he makes a startling and dangerous decision.
episodes.summaryZh: 沃尔特收拾残局。看到他成功的证据，他做出了一个令人震惊且危险的决定。

episodes.title: Blood Money
episodes.summaryEn: As Walt and Jesse adjust to life out of the business, Hank grapples with a troubling lead.
episodes.summaryZh: 沃尔特和杰西适应了业务之外的生活，汉克则努力应对令人不安的领先地位。

episodes.title: Buried
episodes.summaryEn: While Skyler's past catches up with her, Walt covers his tracks. Jesse continues to struggle with his guilt.
episodes.summaryZh: 斯凯勒的过去追上了她，沃尔特却掩盖了他的踪迹。杰西继续与自己的罪恶感作斗争。

episodes.title: Confessions
episodes.summaryEn: Jesse decides to make a change, while Walt and Skyler try to deal with an unexpected demand.
episodes.summaryZh: 杰西决定做出改变，而沃尔特和斯凯勒则试图应对意外的要求。

episodes.title: Rabid Dog
episodes.summaryEn: An unusual strategy starts to bear fruit, while plans are set in motion that could change everything.
episodes.summaryZh: 一项不寻常的策略开始结出硕果，而可能改变一切的计划也已启动。

episodes.title: To'hajiilee
episodes.summaryEn: Things heat up for Walt in unexpected ways.
episodes.summaryZh: 沃尔特的处境以意想不到的方式升温。

episodes.title: Ozymandias
episodes.summaryEn: Everyone copes with radically changed circumstances.
episodes.summaryZh: 每个人都应对急剧变化的环境。

episodes.title: Granite State
episodes.summaryEn: Events set in motion long ago move toward a conclusion.
episodes.summaryZh: 很久以前开始的事件正在走向结局。

episodes.title: Felina
episodes.summaryEn: The acclaimed crime drama comes to a close in the series finale.
episodes.summaryZh: 这部广受好评的犯罪剧在该系列的结局中落下帷幕。

episodes.title: Uno
episodes.summaryEn: Jimmy works his magic in the courtroom. Unexpected inspiration leads him to an unconventional pursuit of potential clients.
episodes.summaryZh: 吉米在法庭上施展魔法。意想不到的灵感引导他以非传统的方式寻找潜在客户。

episodes.title: Mijo
episodes.summaryEn: As his troubles escalate to a boiling point, Jimmy finds himself in dire straits. An act of carelessness puts Chuck at risk.
episodes.summaryZh: 当吉米的麻烦升级到沸点时，他发现自己陷入了困境。粗心的行为使查克面临危险。

episodes.title: Nacho
episodes.summaryEn: Jimmy pulls out all the stops to prove that a dangerous client is innocent, even though it causes some friction with Kim.
episodes.summaryZh: 吉米竭尽全力证明一名危险客户是无辜的，尽管这引起了与金的一些摩擦。

episodes.title: Hero
episodes.summaryEn: Jimmy conjures up a bold plan to solicit new clients, but has to face the consequences when the scheme strains his relationship with a rival firm.
episodes.summaryZh: 吉米想出了一个大胆的计划来招揽新客户，但当该计划使他与竞争对手公司的关系紧张时，他必须面对后果。

episodes.title: Alpine Shepherd Boy
episodes.summaryEn: When his efforts to drum up new business are interrupted by alarming news, Jimmy is pressured to make a difficult choice.
episodes.summaryZh: 当吉米开拓新业务的努力被令人震惊的消息打断时，他被迫做出艰难的选择。

episodes.title: Five-O
episodes.summaryEn: Mike's tragic past comes back to haunt him, and he's forced to seek help from an unusual source. Meanwhile, Jimmy's moral compass is put to the test.
episodes.summaryZh: 迈克悲惨的过去再次困扰着他，他被迫向一个不寻常的来源寻求帮助。与此同时，吉米的道德准则受到考验。

episodes.title: Bingo
episodes.summaryEn: Jimmy meets with potential new clients. Then, when given the opportunity to do the right thing, he cashes in a favor from an unlikely ally.
episodes.summaryZh: 吉米会见潜在的新客户。然后，当他有机会做正确的事时，他从一个不太可能的盟友那里得到了好处。

episodes.title: Rico
episodes.summaryEn: Jimmy shows Chuck that he's willing to do almost anything to win a case, even if it means getting his hands dirty.
episodes.summaryZh: 吉米向查克表明，他愿意做任何事来赢得官司，即使这意味着要弄脏自己的双手。

episodes.title: Pimento
episodes.summaryEn: Chuck urges Jimmy to accept a harsh truth. Meanwhile, a deal threatens to go off the rails when Mike's ability to complete a job is called into question.
episodes.summaryZh: 查克敦促吉米接受残酷的事实。与此同时，当迈克完成工作的能力受到质疑时，一笔交易有可能脱轨。

episodes.title: Marco
episodes.summaryEn: In the aftermath of recent events, Jimmy seizes the opportunity to reconnect with an old friend. Meanwhile, Chuck adjusts to a new way of life.
episodes.summaryZh: 经历了最近的事件后，吉米抓住了与老朋友重新取得联系的机会。与此同时，查克适应了新的生活方式。

episodes.title: Switch
episodes.summaryEn: Jimmy and Kim's relationship takes a new turn. Mike decides it's for the best to sever his affiliation with an unrestrained associate.
episodes.summaryZh: 吉米和金的关系出现了新的转变。迈克认为最好的办法是与一位不受约束的同事断绝关系。

episodes.title: Cobbler
episodes.summaryEn: Mike brokers a deal in order to keep a potentially messy situation intact; Jimmy tries to exonerate an eccentric client.
episodes.summaryZh: 迈克促成了一项交易，以保持潜在混乱的局面完好无损；吉米试图为一位古怪的客户开脱。

episodes.title: Amarillo
episodes.summaryEn: Jimmy's client outreach efforts succeed, and he exhibits new heights of showmanship; Mike is puzzled by Stacey's upsetting news.
episodes.summaryZh: 吉米的客户拓展工作取得了成功，他的表演技巧也达到了新的高度；迈克对史黛西令人不安的消息感到困惑。

episodes.title: Gloves Off
episodes.summaryEn: Jimmy's actions unexpectedly create waves for Kim. Meanwhile, Mike cautiously weighs a lucrative proposal that might bring about dire consequences.
episodes.summaryZh: 吉米的举动意外地为金掀起了波澜。与此同时，迈克谨慎地权衡了一项可能带来可怕后果的有利可图的提议。

episodes.title: Rebecca
episodes.summaryEn: Jimmy becomes frustrated with his restrictive work environment. Meanwhile, Kim pulls out all the stops to dig herself out of a seemingly bottomless hole at HHM.
episodes.summaryZh: 吉米对他受限的工作环境感到沮丧。与此同时，Kim 使出浑身解数，想把自己从 HHM 看似无底洞中挖出来。

episodes.title: Bali Ha'i
episodes.summaryEn: Jimmy finds comfort in familiarity; Kim receives a life-changing proposal; when he is threatened, Mike finds himself pushed to the limit.
episodes.summaryZh: 吉米在熟悉中找到了安慰；金收到了一个改变生活的求婚；当迈克受到威胁时，他发现自己被逼到了极限。

episodes.title: Inflatable
episodes.summaryEn: Mike's growing frustration shows when his hand is forced, but with Jimmy's help, he works to keep the peace. Meanwhile, Jimmy boldly forges a new path forward.
episodes.summaryZh: 当迈克被迫出手时，他的挫败感与日俱增，但在吉米的帮助下，他努力维持和平。与此同时，吉米大胆地开辟了一条新的前进道路。

episodes.title: Fifi
episodes.summaryEn: Mike is determined to settle the score with a dangerous adversary. An unexpected opportunity to gain a competitive edge falls in Jimmy's lap.
episodes.summaryZh: 迈克决心与危险的对手算账。吉米获得了一个意想不到的获得竞争优势的机会。

episodes.title: Nailed
episodes.summaryEn: Mike takes a methodical approach to his mission. Someone questions Chuck's capabilities. Jimmy faces a personal dilemma.
episodes.summaryZh: 迈克采取有条不紊的方法来完成他的使命。有人质疑查克的能力。吉米面临着个人困境。

episodes.title: Klick
episodes.summaryEn: Jimmy is forced to make a hard choice. Mike takes matters into his own hands. Hamlin relays shocking news while Chuck's condition continues to evolve.
episodes.summaryZh: 吉米被迫做出艰难的选择。迈克亲自处理此事。哈姆林传达了令人震惊的消息，而查克的病情仍在继续恶化。

episodes.title: Mabel
episodes.summaryEn: Jimmy and Chuck's relationship deteriorates; Kim feels the pressure of running her own firm; Mike investigates the note left on his car.
episodes.summaryZh: 吉米和查克的关系恶化；金感受到了经营自己公司的压力；迈克调查了留在他车上的纸条。

episodes.title: Witness
episodes.summaryEn: Jimmy and Kim hire an assistant; Mike seeks out a mysterious acquaintance; Chuck uses the law to gain an advantage over Jimmy.
episodes.summaryZh: 吉米和金聘请了一名助理；迈克寻找一位神秘的熟人；查克利用法律获得了对吉米的优势。

episodes.title: Sunk Costs
episodes.summaryEn: Jimmy decides to represent a new client to Kim's dismay; Mike meets a formidable ally who gives a tempting offer.
episodes.summaryZh: 吉米决定代表一位新客户，这让金感到沮丧；迈克遇到了一位强大的盟友，他提出了诱人的提议。

episodes.title: Sabrosito
episodes.summaryEn: Jimmy asks a favor of Mike; new complications disrupt Salamancas' business; Chuck and Jimmy struggle with a compromise.
episodes.summaryZh: 吉米请求迈克帮忙；新的并发症扰乱了萨拉曼卡斯的业务；查克和吉米努力寻求妥协。

episodes.title: Chicanery
episodes.summaryEn: Kim and Jimmy face off with an adversary; Jimmy looks to Chuck's past to secure his future; Jimmy loses an ally and gains another.
episodes.summaryZh: 金和吉米与对手对峙；吉米依靠查克的过去来确保他的未来；吉米失去了一个盟友，又获得了另一个盟友。

episodes.title: Off Brand
episodes.summaryEn: Jimmy has a new endeavor; Chuck pushes himself to the limit; Nacho finds himself in a power struggle.
episodes.summaryZh: 吉米有了新的尝试； Chuck将自己推向极限；纳乔发现自己陷入了权力斗争。

episodes.title: Expenses
episodes.summaryEn: Jimmy tries to settle debts; Nacho reunites with an acquaintance; Mike helps Stacey with a project and makes a connection.
episodes.summaryZh: 吉米试图偿还债务；纳乔与熟人重逢；迈克帮助史黛西完成一个项目并建立了联系。

episodes.title: Slip
episodes.summaryEn: Jimmy is pushed to desperate measures; Nacho picks up a skill; Mike explores an alliance; Kim stands up to Hamlin.
episodes.summaryZh: 吉米被迫采取绝望的措施；纳乔学会了一项技能；迈克探索联盟；金勇敢地面对哈姆林。

episodes.title: Fall
episodes.summaryEn: Jimmy visits a friend and takes up an old pastime; Chuck and Hamlin argue over the future of the firm; Kim faces challenges.
episodes.summaryZh: 吉米拜访了一位朋友并开始了一项古老的消遣活动；查克和哈姆林就公司的未来争论不休；金正恩面临挑战。

episodes.title: Lantern
episodes.summaryEn: Kim takes time off; Jimmy tries to make amends; Nacho gambles with his future; Hamlin pushes Chuck to make a decision.
episodes.summaryZh: 金请假；吉米试图弥补；纳乔拿自己的未来做赌注；哈姆林敦促查克做出决定。

episodes.title: Smoke
episodes.summaryEn: Jimmy struggles to cope with Chuck's tragic death; Mike ponders his role at Madrigal; Howard makes a startling confession.
episodes.summaryZh: 吉米努力应对查克的惨死；迈克思考他在马德里加尔的角色；霍华德做出了令人震惊的坦白。

episodes.title: Breathe
episodes.summaryEn: Jimmy seeks new employment; Gus navigates the fallout from Hector's collapse; Kim endeavors to support Jimmy in the wake of Chuck's death.
episodes.summaryZh: 吉米寻找新工作；格斯应对赫克托崩溃的后果；查克去世后，金努力支持吉米。

episodes.title: Something Beautiful
episodes.summaryEn: Jimmy puts a risky plan into motion; as alliances shift, Nacho finds himself in the crosshairs; Kim contemplates her future.
episodes.summaryZh: 吉米实施了一个冒险的计划；随着联盟的转变，纳乔发现自己成为了众矢之的。金思考她的未来。

episodes.title: Talk
episodes.summaryEn: A restless Jimmy embarks on a new endeavor while Mike burns bridges; Kim pursues her bliss; Nacho tries to survive a turf war.
episodes.summaryZh: 焦躁不安的吉米开始了新的尝试，而迈克则自毁前程；金追求她的幸福；纳乔试图在地盘争夺战中生存下来。

episodes.title: Quite a Ride
episodes.summaryEn: Jimmy identifies a new market for his talents; Mike vets a potential partnership; Kim drives a hard bargain.
episodes.summaryZh: 吉米为他的才华找到了一个新市场；迈克审查潜在的合作伙伴关系；金极力讨价还价。

episodes.title: Piñata
episodes.summaryEn: While Jimmy dreams of Wexler-McGill, Kim makes a bold move; Mike puts a plan into motion for Gus.
episodes.summaryZh: 当吉米梦见韦克斯勒-麦吉尔时，金做出了大胆的举动；迈克为格斯制定了一项计划。

episodes.title: Something Stupid
episodes.summaryEn: Jimmy expands his business, but runs into a problem that only Kim can solve; Gus intervenes in Hector's medical care; Mike deals with a setback.
episodes.summaryZh: 吉米拓展业务，却遇到了只有金才能解决的问题；格斯介入赫克托的医疗护理；迈克遇到了挫折。

episodes.title: Coushatta
episodes.summaryEn: Jimmy goes to great lengths to right a wrong, as Kim pulls out all the stops for a case; Mike lets his team blow off steam; Nacho receives a visitor.
episodes.summaryZh: 吉米竭尽全力纠正错误，而金则竭尽全力办案。迈克让他的团队发泄情绪；纳乔接待访客。

episodes.title: Wiedersehen
episodes.summaryEn: Jimmy and Kim unburden themselves, risking their relationship in the process; Nacho is forced to make the rounds with Lalo; Mike has cause to worry.
episodes.summaryZh: 吉米和金卸下了自己的负担，在此过程中，他们的关系面临着风险；纳乔被迫与拉洛一起巡视；迈克有理由担心。

episodes.title: Winner
episodes.summaryEn: Jimmy turns the page on his reputation; Lalo tracks a loose end in Gus' operation; Mike is forced to make a difficult decision.
episodes.summaryZh: 吉米的声誉翻开了新的一页。拉洛追踪格斯行动中的一个未解决的问题；迈克被迫做出一个艰难的决定。

episodes.title: Magic Man
episodes.summaryEn: Now doing business as Saul Goodman, Jimmy unveils an unorthodox strategy for client development that tests Kim's tolerance of his new legal persona. Lalo searches for the mysterious Michael, only to discover a problem within his own operation.
episodes.summaryZh: 吉米现在以索尔·古德曼 (Saul Goodman) 的身份开展业务，他推出了一项非正统的客户开发策略，考验金对其新法律角色的容忍度。拉洛寻找神秘的迈克尔，却发现自己的行动出现了问题。

episodes.title: 50% Off
episodes.summaryEn: Jimmy's promotional stunt has unintended consequences. Nacho takes extreme measures to earn Lalo's trust. Saul is a success at the courthouse, but still has yet to win Kim over. Simmering with rage and self-loathing, Mike loses his temper.
episodes.summaryZh: 吉米的促销噱头产生了意想不到的后果。纳乔采取极端措施来赢得拉罗的信任。索尔在法院取得了成功，但仍未赢得金的支持。迈克因愤怒和自我厌恶而发脾气。

episodes.title: The Guy for This
episodes.summaryEn: Kim's confidence is tested when she's faced with a legal problem only she can solve.
episodes.summaryZh: 当金面临只有她才能解决的法律问题时，她的信心受到了考验。

episodes.title: Namaste
episodes.summaryEn: As Jimmy doubles down on Saul Goodman, a deeply conflicted Kim brings him an interesting proposition. Gus makes a sacrifice in order to play the long game. Mike attempts to smooth things over with his family.
episodes.summaryZh: 当吉米对索尔·古德曼加倍努力时，矛盾重重的金向他提出了一个有趣的提议。格斯为了打持久战做出了牺牲。迈克试图与家人调解此事。

episodes.title: Dedicado a Max
episodes.summaryEn: Mike makes an unexpected trip out of town; Kim makes a surprising decision as she grows closer to Jimmy over their determination to help a client.
episodes.summaryZh: 迈克出人意料地出城旅行；当金和吉米决定帮助客户时，她和吉米的关系越来越密切，她做出了一个令人惊讶的决定。

episodes.title: Wexler v. Goodman
episodes.summaryEn: Kim fears she is too late to stop Saul as she tries to reign in Jimmy's newest scheme; Mike increases the pressure on Lalo; Nacho struggles to gain support.
episodes.summaryZh: 金担心自己来不及阻止索尔，因为她试图控制吉米的最新计划；迈克加大了拉罗的压力；纳乔努力争取支持。

episodes.title: JMM
episodes.summaryEn: Kim and Jimmy turn to Huell for help with a legal firewall; Jimmy is compromised as Kim struggles to work things out with her clients; despite the issues he faces, Gus navigates his way to build an empire; Mike tries to do damage control.
episodes.summaryZh: 金和吉米向休尔寻求法律防火墙方面的帮助；当金努力与客户解决问题时，吉米受到了妥协；尽管面临诸多问题，格斯仍坚持不懈地建立了一个帝国；迈克尝试进行损害控制。

episodes.title: Bagman
episodes.summaryEn: Jimmy is pushed to his limit as he strives to help a client only for the simple task to go awry; Mike tries to deal with angry cartel members; a surprise visitor meets Lalo.
episodes.summaryZh: 吉米努力帮助客户，却因为简单的任务出了差错而被逼到了极限；迈克试图对付愤怒的卡特尔成员；一位意外访客遇见了拉罗。

episodes.title: Bad Choice Road
episodes.summaryEn: In the wake of Jimmy's traumatic misadventure, Kim takes stock of what is important. Jimmy attempts to return to business as usual, but it's more difficult than anticipated. Gus and Mike set a plan in motion.
episodes.summaryZh: 吉米经历了惨痛的不幸事件后，金开始盘点什么是重要的。吉米试图恢复正常，但这比预期的要困难。格斯和迈克制定了一项计划。

episodes.title: Something Unforgivable
episodes.summaryEn: Jimmy and Kim make a sideways move that takes a serious turn; Nacho gets closer to the cartel.
episodes.summaryZh: 吉米和金做出了一个横向举动，结果发生了严重的转变；纳乔与贩毒集团的关系越来越近。

episodes.title: Wine and Roses
episodes.summaryEn: Nacho runs for his life. Jimmy and Kim hatch a plan. Mike questions his allegiances.
episodes.summaryZh: 纳乔逃命。吉米和金制定了一个计划。迈克质疑他的忠诚。

episodes.title: Carrot and Stick
episodes.summaryEn: Harsh realities dawn on Nacho. Gus investigates his suspicions.
episodes.summaryZh: 纳乔逐渐意识到残酷的现实。格斯调查他的怀疑。

episodes.title: Rock and Hard Place
episodes.summaryEn: Still on the run, Nacho is forced to choose where his loyalties lie. Jimmy doubles down.
episodes.summaryZh: 仍在逃亡中的纳乔被迫选择他的忠诚所在。吉米加倍努力。

episodes.title: Hit and Run
episodes.summaryEn: Gus takes extreme measures. Jimmy and Kim enlist a local pro to put on a show.
episodes.summaryZh: 格斯采取极端措施。吉米和金招募了一位当地专业人士来表演。

episodes.title: Black and Blue
episodes.summaryEn: While business booms for Jimmy, the vise tightens on the cat-and-mouse game between Gus and Lalo.
episodes.summaryZh: 吉米的生意蒸蒸日上，而格斯和拉洛之间的猫鼠游戏却愈演愈烈。

episodes.title: Axe and Grind
episodes.summaryEn: Kim and Jimmy enlist a knowledgeable contact. Howard scrutinizes Jimmy's business practices. Mike refuses to compromise as tensions mount within Gus' operation. Lalo interrogates a witness.
episodes.summaryZh: 金和吉米聘请了一位知识渊博的联系人。霍华德仔细审查吉米的商业行为。由于格斯的运营中的紧张局势不断加剧，迈克拒绝妥协。拉洛审问一名证人。

episodes.title: Plan and Execution
episodes.summaryEn: Jimmy and Kim deal with a last-minute snag in their plan.
episodes.summaryZh: 吉米和金在计划的最后一刻遇到了障碍。

episodes.title: Point and Shoot
episodes.summaryEn: An unexpected visitor forces Jimmy and Kim to face the consequences of their actions.
episodes.summaryZh: 一位不速之客迫使吉米和金面对他们行为的后果。

episodes.title: Fun and Games
episodes.summaryEn: Gus attempts to smooth things over with the cartel while Mike ties up loose ends north of the border.
episodes.summaryZh: 格斯试图与贩毒集团融洽相处，而迈克则在边境北部收拾残局。

episodes.title: Nippy
episodes.summaryEn: A new player gets in the game.
episodes.summaryZh: 一名新玩家加入游戏。

episodes.title: Breaking Bad
episodes.summaryEn: Emboldened by recent successes, partners throw caution to the wind and escalate their enterprise to new levels.
episodes.summaryZh: 受到最近成功的鼓舞，合作伙伴将谨慎抛诸脑后，将他们的企业提升到新的水平。

episodes.title: Waterworks
episodes.summaryEn: The stakes are raised when a discovery is made that will send shockwaves far and wide.
episodes.summaryZh: 当一项会引起广泛冲击波的发现出现时，赌注就会增加。

episodes.title: Saul Gone
episodes.summaryEn: The series finale.
episodes.summaryZh: 该系列的结局。
